stemHtml: The FMS Required Time of Arrival (RTA) function can provide:

options.a: a speed target to satisfy a time constraint entered at a flight plan waypoint.
options.b: a time prediction at the active TO waypoint complying with the wind computation.
options.c: a time slot computed for the arrival time at destination, using the current aircraft speed and speed constraints along the flight plan.
options.d: a time prediction at the flight plan waypoints based on the current speed and speed constraints along the flight plan.
